toolbar.ariaLabel: Pẹpẹ irinṣẹ pẹlu awọn ẹgbẹ bọtini

connection.offlineAria: Olootu n ṣiṣẹ ni ipo aisinipo, eyi tumọ si pe iwọ nikan ni o n ṣatunkọ
connection.onlineAria: Olootu wa ni ipo ifowosowopo nipasẹ {type}, eyi tumọ si pe o le pin URL ki o bẹrẹ ṣiṣatunkọ pẹlu awọn omiiran
connection.switchOfflineAria: Pa ṣiṣatunkọ ifowosowopo ki o yipada si ipo aisinipo
connection.switchWebRTCAria: Yipada si ṣiṣatunkọ ifowosowopo nipasẹ WebRTC
connection.switchWebSocketAria: Yipada si ṣiṣatunkọ ifowosowopo nipasẹ WebSocket

share.collaborationLinkTitle: Pin iwe yii pẹlu awọn omiiran
share.collaborationLinkTooltip: Ṣe fork iwe yii ṣaaju ki o to lo iṣẹ yii
share.embedCodeAria: Gba koodu ifibọ fun iṣẹ-ẹkọ lọwọlọwọ ninu olootu
share.externalResourceAria: Lo URL iwe ita fun pinpin pẹlu olootu
share.githubGistLinkTooltip: O gbọdọ kọkọ gbe faili yii jade si GitHub Gist ṣaaju lilo iṣẹ yii
share.githubGistLinkAria: Ṣajọ iṣẹ-ẹkọ LiaScript lati gbigbe jade iṣaaju si GitHub Gist
share.dataUriAria: Pin iṣẹ-ẹkọ lọwọlọwọ ni LiaScript, pẹlu akoonu ti a fi sinu URL
share.fileUrlTooltip: Iṣẹ yii wa nikan ti o ba ti pin orisun ita
share.downloadZip: Gba gbogbo iṣẹ akanṣe bi faili ZIP
share.githubGistAria: Fi iwe pamọ sori GitHub bi gist
share.githubGistTooltip: Ṣe fork iwe yii ṣaaju ki o to lo iṣẹ yii
share.nostrLinkTooltip: You have to publish this file to Nostr before you can use this functionality
share.nostrLinkAria: Load the LiaScript course from a previous Nostr publication
share.exporterAria: Send the whole project to a LiaScript Exporter to convert it to SCORM, PDF, APK, ...
share.exporterTooltip: Hand the entire project to a local or remote LiaScript Exporter for conversion
share.githubRepoFileTooltip: Open the active file as a LiaScript course from the linked GitHub repository (push your changes first). Only available for GitHub-linked projects.

modal.collaborationBody: Ti o ba pin ọna asopọ ni isalẹ, olootu yoo wa ni ipo ifowosowopo. Ṣiṣẹ aisinipo yẹ ki o tun ṣee ṣe, ṣugbọn gbogbo awọn olumulo ti o sopọ yoo ṣiṣẹ lori iṣẹ-ẹkọ kan naa. Ti o ba gba eyi nipasẹ ọna asopọ ifowosowopo ati pe o fẹ ṣẹda iṣẹ-ẹkọ tuntun patapata funra rẹ, tẹ bọtini "Fork", eyi yoo ṣẹda ẹya tuntun patapata.
modal.externalResourceBody: Lo URL yii lati ṣeto akoonu ọna asopọ pinpin rẹ ṣaaju. Ni ipo yii olootu yoo kọkọ gbiyanju lati kojọpọ faili Markdown ki o fi akoonu rẹ sinu olootu. Ọna asopọ yii yoo ṣiṣẹ nikan ti faili Markdown rẹ ba le wọle si nipasẹ intanẹẹti.
modal.dataProtocolBody: Gbogbo akoonu iṣẹ-ẹkọ ni a kọ sinu Base64 tabi URI, a si fi sinu data-URI. Nitori Base64 le kuna fun diẹ ninu awọn ede, URL ti a kọ bi URI tun ni a ṣẹda. Sibẹsibẹ, eyi ṣiṣẹ fun awọn iṣẹ-ẹkọ kukuru nikan; bi iṣẹ-ẹkọ ṣe gun to, bẹẹ ni URI ṣe gun. Nigbati o ba n pin olootu rẹ nipasẹ ojiṣẹ fun apẹẹrẹ, kọkọ ṣayẹwo pe ko si apakan ti a ge kuro. Bakannaa awọn aṣawakiri oriṣiriṣi ṣe atilẹyin awọn gigun URL oriṣiriṣi... (Yan ẹya ti o kuru)
modal.snapshotBody: Awọn aworan akoko jẹ URL ti o ni gbogbo itumọ iṣẹ-ẹkọ ninu. Sibẹsibẹ, eyi ṣiṣẹ fun awọn iṣẹ-ẹkọ kukuru nikan; bi iṣẹ-ẹkọ ṣe gun to, bẹẹ ni URL ṣe gun. Nigbati o ba n pin olootu rẹ nipasẹ ojiṣẹ fun apẹẹrẹ, kọkọ ṣayẹwo pe ko si apakan ti a ge kuro. Bakannaa awọn aṣawakiri oriṣiriṣi ṣe atilẹyin awọn gigun URL oriṣiriṣi...
modal.embedBody: Daakọ koodu HTML yii sinu oju opo wẹẹbu rẹ lati fi iṣẹ-ẹkọ yii sii gẹgẹ bi apẹẹrẹ. O le tun ṣe atunṣe URL pẹlu ọkan ninu awọn atẹle lati ṣi olootu tabi awotẹlẹ taara:

prompt.shareFileUrl: jọwọ tẹ URL faili Markdown ti o fẹ pin

examples.footer: Eyi jẹ olootu ori ayelujara fun ifowosowopo fun {liascript}. Gbogbo akoonu wa ni ipamọ ninu aṣawakiri rẹ nikan. Wa {templates} ti a le fi sii tabi {courses} ti a ti tẹjade tẹlẹ.

index.footer: Eyi jẹ olootu ori ayelujara fun ifowosowopo fun {liascript}. Gbogbo akoonu wa ni ipamọ ninu aṣawakiri rẹ nikan. Ti o ba nilo awokose, wo diẹ ninu awọn {examples} wa, wa {templates} ti a le fi sii, tabi {courses} ti a ti tẹjade tẹlẹ.

import.heading: Import from
import.title: Create a new project
import.newDesc: Start with a blank document and write from scratch.
import.uploadDesc: Pick a Markdown file or a ZIP archive from your device.
import.githubDesc: Import the files of a public GitHub repository.
import.urlDesc: Load a Markdown file or ZIP archive from a web link.
import.gistDesc: Import all files of a GitHub Gist into a new project.
import.localFolderDesc: Open a folder on your computer (Chrome / Edge only).
import.githubHint: Pick the files to import on the next screen.
import.urlHint: Loads a Markdown file or a ZIP archive into a new project.
import.gistHint: Imports all files of the gist into a new project.

errors.generic: Import failed. Please check your input and try again.
errors.invalidRepo: Could not recognise a GitHub repository in that input.
errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid http(s) URL.
errors.invalidGist: Could not find a gist for that ID.
errors.fetchFailed: Could not load the resource. Check the URL and your connection.

card.deleteConfirm: Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ paarẹ iwe yii lailai?

toast.compileHint: O le ṣatunkọ ati kompaili iṣẹ-ẹkọ yii pẹlu {ctrl}, ṣugbọn ti o ba fẹ fi awọn ayipada pamọ titilai o gbọdọ ṣe fork!
toast.compileHintEmbed: O le ṣatunkọ ati kompaili iṣẹ-ẹkọ yii pẹlu {ctrl}, tabi ṣi i ninu {link}.
toast.compileHintEmbedOnly: O le ṣatunkọ ati kompaili iṣẹ-ẹkọ yii pẹlu {ctrl}

toast.toolbarHint: Lo pẹpẹ irinṣẹ lati yipada laarin awọn ipo olootu ati awotẹlẹ.

github.exporting: N gbe jade si GitHub Gist...
github.badCredentials: Awọn iwe eri ko tọ, oju-iwe n tun kojọpọ

menu.importTooltip: Import files from a GitHub repository
menu.pushTooltip: Commit and push changes to the linked repository
menu.pullTooltip: Fetch changes from the linked repository
menu.publishTooltip: Create a new GitHub repository and push all project files

import.title: Import from GitHub
import.repoHint: Public repositories can be imported without a token.
import.truncated: This repository is very large; the file list was truncated by GitHub.
import.emptyRepo: This repository is empty. An empty README.md will be created to start your project.

push.title: Push to GitHub
push.remoteDrift: The repository changed on GitHub since your last sync. Consider pulling first; unchanged remote files are preserved.

pull.title: Pull from GitHub
pull.upToDate: Your project is up to date with GitHub.

pat.intro: Add a Personal Access Token (PAT) to raise the rate limit and to access private repositories or push changes.
pat.howtoToggle: How do I create a token?
pat.step2: Choose a name and an expiration, then select the repositories you want to use.
pat.step3Write: Under "Repository permissions" set "Contents" to "Read and write".
pat.step4: Generate the token, copy it and paste it below.

errors.badUrl: Please enter a valid repository (owner/repo or a GitHub URL).
errors.notFound: Repository, branch or file not found.
errors.network: Could not reach GitHub. Please check your connection.

publish.title: Publish to a new repository
publish.intro: Create a new GitHub repository and push all project files into it.

nostr.title: Pin nipasẹ Nostr
nostr.publicKeyHint: Bọtini gbangba rẹ ni a lo lati mọ ọ lori nẹtiwọọki Nostr.
nostr.privateKeyHint: Bọtini ikọkọ rẹ nilo lati fọwọsi ati tẹjade awọn ifiweranṣẹ. Pa a mọ lailewu.
nostr.storeCredentials: Fi awọn iwe eri pamọ ninu aṣawakiri yii
nostr.storeCredentialsWarning: Fifi bọtini ikọkọ pamọ ninu aṣawakiri rọrun, ṣugbọn ko ni aabo to.
nostr.relayPlaceholder: Tẹ awọn olupin relay (ọkan fun ila)
nostr.relayHint: Tẹ awọn olupin relay (ọkan fun ila) ti a o tẹjade akoonu rẹ si.
nostr.rememberRelays: Ranti awọn relay wọnyi fun awọn ifiweranṣẹ ọjọ iwaju
nostr.saveKeyWarningTitle: Pataki: fi bọtini ikọkọ rẹ pamọ
nostr.saveKeyWarningBody: Bọtini ikọkọ yii funni ni wiwọle si idanimọ Nostr rẹ. Fi pamọ lailewu.
nostr.intro: Pin iṣẹ-ẹkọ rẹ pẹlu agbegbe Nostr. O le tẹjade taara tabi kọkọ ṣe akanṣe ifiweranṣẹ rẹ.
nostr.nostrLinkLabel: Ọna asopọ Nostr fun iṣẹ-ẹkọ rẹ:
nostr.embedMedia: Fi awọn faili media sii bi data URI
nostr.embedMediaHint: Yi awọn aworan, ohun ati fidio pada si data URI ti a fi sii fun gbigbe dara julọ.
nostr.messagePlaceholder: Ṣafikun ifiranṣẹ lati ba ifiweranṣẹ Nostr rẹ lọ...
nostr.alertGenerateFailed: Ko le ṣẹda bata bọtini. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
nostr.alertMissingKeys: Jọwọ tẹ bọtini gbangba ati bọtini ikọkọ rẹ ṣaaju tẹjade.
nostr.alertMissingRelay: Jọwọ tẹ o kere ju olupin relay kan.
nostr.alertPublishFailed: Tẹjade si nẹtiwọọki Nostr kuna. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
nostr.alertMissingPrivateKey: Jọwọ pese bọtini ikọkọ rẹ lati fọwọsi ati tẹjade ifiweranṣẹ.
nostr.alertInvalidKey: Ọna kika bọtini gbangba ko tọ

exporter.title: LiaScript Exporter
exporter.urlHint: Start the exporter locally with 'liaex serve', or enter the address of a hosted exporter. The project is sent to this server and converted there.
exporter.resendTitle: Send the current project to the exporter again
exporter.handed: Project handed to the exporter. Choose a format/preset below and start the export.
exporter.errorInvalidUrl: Invalid URL. Please enter a full address, e.g. http://localhost:3000
exporter.errorMixedContent: This editor runs over HTTPS and cannot embed an insecure HTTP exporter (except localhost). Please use an HTTPS exporter URL.
exporter.errorNoHandshake: Could not reach the exporter. Make sure it is running ('liaex serve') and reachable at this URL, and that it allows being embedded.
exporter.errorNoProject: No active project found to export.
exporter.errorSend: Failed to package and send the project.

sync.title: Synchronize with local folder
sync.inSync: Editor and folder are already in sync.
